mapper.select: SELECT R.*, B.* FROM "TB_BOOKRENT" R JOIN "TB_BOOK" B ON R."BOOK_NUM" = B."BOOK_NUM" WHERE R."USERNAME" = #{username} AND R."RETURN_DATE" IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "TB_BOOKRENT" ( "RENT_NUM", "RENT_DATE", "DUE_DATE", "BOOK_NUM", "USERNAME" ) VALUES ( DEFAULT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '10 days', #{bookNum}, #{username} )
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, B."BOOK_TITLE" FROM "TB_BOOKRENT" R LEFTJOIN "TB_BOOK" B USING ("BOOK_NUM") WHERE R."USERNAME" = #{username} AND R."RETURN_DATE" IS NULL AND R."DUE_DATE" < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
